name: Multi-Architecture Tuning
description: Detects container architecture and sets environment variables for Ollama, PyTorch, and uv to avoid model/toolchain mismatches on Apple Silicon or CPU-only hosts

ollamaModel.description: Ollama model tag to use. 'auto' selects arm64-optimized or default based on architecture.

pytorchIndex.description: PyTorch package index URL. 'auto' selects cpu or cuda based on architecture and GPU availability.
